case_title: PATEL, PARESH I. vs. WILLIAMS, SHERMAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, SHERMAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 140 TURK ST 	, LEASE FORFEITED
